title: iit-DLSLab/fault-locomotion-isaaclab
abstract:
An IsaacLab DirectEnv for quadrupedal locomotion under motor failures, with support for multiple quadruped robots, sim-to-sim, and sim-to-real pipelines

# fault-loco-isaaclab An IsaacLab DirectEnv for quadrupedal locomotion under motor failures, with support for multiple quadruped robots, sim-to-sim, and sim-to-real pipelines. Code will be released soon.
abstract_zh: 一个基于IsaacLab DirectEnv的四足机器人运动环境，专门针对电机故障场景，支持多种四足机器人、仿真到仿真以及仿真到现实的迁移流程。# fault-loco-isaaclab 一个基于IsaacLab DirectEnv的四足机器人运动环境，专门针对电机故障场景，支持多种四足机器人、仿真到仿真以及仿真到现实的迁移流程。代码即将发布。
tldr_zh: 针对电机故障的四足机器人运动仿真环境，支持多机器人及sim-to-real。
cover_zh: 腿断了也能跑？这个四足机器人故障环境让运动控制更鲁棒！

judge.reason: 四足机器人故障下运动控制的仿真环境，支持sim2real，有实用价值。
